REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1822 9th Avenue, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Jul-19-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Judith Baer for and with Cicero Jones Jr.

The sale was confirmed at $652,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago.
